issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

labels.name: NSFW
labels.description: Nudes and porn sites

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

comment.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://www.youtube.com/BBCNews/videos](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2FBBCNews%2Fvideos) ### Comment > Update to https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/203236#issuecomment-3907741238 > > https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/203236#issuecomment-3908131146 > > > I have checked few videos from `https://www.youtube.com/@BBCNews/videos` (copied link and opened in a new tab), but I cannot reproduce it. > > I tested multiple videos via an AdGuard VPN server in Poland, but fake buffering rarely occurs (only one time, maybe a bug). Try Japan or USA servers. > > https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/203236#issuecomment-3909598569 > > > Anyone having the comments and description issue, please test adding > > ``` > www.youtube.com#%#//scriptlet('set-constant', 'ytcfg.data_.EXPERIMENT_FLAGS.web_streaming_watch', 'false') > ``` > > to User rules and report back. You have to manually refresh the page after adding and saving that. > > I also have the issue: comments and descriptions are not displayed on the initial load of the first video you visit after opening a new profile. This usually occurs only once; they are displayed normally after you refresh the page or click another video. > > How to reproduce: > 1. Open a browser (Chrome or Safari) in a new profile > 2. Type `https://www.youtube.com/@BBCNews/videos` into the search bar > 3. Click any video > > After I add your rule: > > 1. For videos that allow comments by default > the comments-descriptions-issue is resolved, but instead fake buffering comes out on warm navigation. Fake buffering on cold navigation remains the same. > > 2. For videos that disable comments by default (e.g. `https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=OLAK5uy_lChC6g7wY6k_RJkLhYwf-doyMVhN41KO4`) > the description issue is resolved by your rule, and fake buffering rarely occurs on warm navigation even after your rule is added. comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

I missed taking screenshots earlier as a result, i could not report issues earlier. > > I have been using Adguard since many years in all my devices. You wont believe, over the years i have changed my laptop many times, but never moved on to use any other adblockers, because you guys have made the best product!. > > However, sorry to report quite recently there are afew ads been played in the youtube. comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

labels.name: A: Problematic

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

<details>
<summary>Detailed description for iOS users</summary>

1. Install [**Usercripts**](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/userscripts/id1463298887) app
2. Enable **Usercripts** extension in Safari settings
	* iOS 18+: `System settings` => `Apps` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	* iOS 17 and older: `System settings` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	Find **Usercripts**, enable it and allow `On other sites` permission
4. Open the [tinyShield ](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js) userscript URL in browser
5. Press the extensions icon in the address bar of Safari and select Userscripts 
6. Tap to install
7. In opened popup, scroll down and press Install button
8. Done.

</details>

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://photos.google.com](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fphotos.google.com) ### Comment > Hello AdGuard Support Team, > > I would like to report an issue with video playback in Google Photos when using AdGuard for Mac. > > **Environment:** > > * AdGuard for Mac: **2.18.0.2089 (release)** > * macOS: **26.2 (25C56)** > * Browser: **Microsoft Edge Version 144.0.3719.115 (Official build) (arm64)** > (same behavior observed in other browsers) > * AdGuard Browser Extension: installed, but the issue persists even when the extension is disabled > > **Issue description:** > > * Videos on Google Photos (`https://photos.google.com`) fail to play. > * The video shows a loading spinner for a long time and then displays the message: > *“An error occurred. Please try again later.”* > * This happens **only when the AdGuard for Mac application is active**. > * As soon as I **pause AdGuard for Mac**, videos start playing immediately and reliably. > > **Key observations:** > > * Disabling the AdGuard browser extension has **no effect**. > * Adding exceptions: > > * via the regular whitelist, > * and via **Advanced Settings** (including broad domains such as `*.google.com`, `*.googleusercontent.com`, `*.gstatic.com`) > **does not resolve the issue**. > * Changing filtering modes (e.g. Automatic Proxy) **does not help**. > * **YouTube works without any issues** while AdGuard is active. > * The issue is reproducible across browsers and profiles. > > **Steps to reproduce:** > > 1. Enable AdGuard for Mac. > 2. Open Google Photos and attempt to play any video → playback fails. > 3. Pause AdGuard for Mac and reload the page → video plays successfully. > > If needed, I am happy to **provide debug logs or additional diagnostic information**. > Please let me know the preferred way to collect and submit logs for further analysis. > > Thank you for your time and support. > > ### Screenshots

comment.body: Hi! Did you mean the URL or something else? Where did you get it? Btw, it's better to use [AdGuard for Android](https://adguard.com/adguard-android/overview.html). AdGuard Content Blocker has some restrictions due to the browser API.

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

labels.name: NSFW
labels.description: Nudes and porn sites

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.citilink.ru/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.citilink.ru%2F) ### Comment > Вероятно, DNS-правило ||stghyx.citilink.ru^ в DNS-фильтре AG ломает электронные письма от магазина электроники Ситилинк, в том числе, письма с подтверждением адреса электронной почты аккаунта. Эту проблему я заметил уже давно, но поскольку переходить по ссылкам из письма мне не требовалось, не сообщал об этом. Изображения в письмах загружаются нормально, но ссылки не работают. Сейчас мне необходимо было подтвердить новый адрес электронной почты, по ссылке из письма, поэтому, пришлось решать проблему. > > Отключение правила или полная остановка защиты в AG мне не помогла, так как фильтрующие AG DNS у меня прописаны не только в блокировщике рекламы AG, но и в настройках Windows и в Wi-Fi маршрутизаторе. > > Проблему решил следующим способом: > 1. Полностью отключил защиту AG. > 2. Запустил AG VPN, выбрал DNS от Google и VPN-локацию "Россия". > После этого, смог подтвердить адрес электронной почты, перейдя по ссылке в электронном письме, которая ранее не работала. > > Из интересного, пользуюсь антивирусом Касперского, в максимальной редакции. Модуль антибаннера в антивирусе полностью отключён. А вот модуль защиты от сервисов сбора аналитики включён, он не конфликтует с блокировщиком рекламы AG. Веб-сайт citilink.ru находится в исключениях у модуля блокировки сервисов аналитики Касперского, так как если блокировать их, это может привести к нарушению работоспособности сайта Ситилинк. ### Screenshots

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.citilink.ru/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.citilink.ru%2F) ### Comment > Вероятно, DNS-правило ||stghyx.citilink.ru^ в DNS-фильтре AG ломает электронные письма от магазина электроники Ситилинк, в том числе, письма с подтверждением адреса электронной почты аккаунта. Эту проблему я заметил уже давно, но поскольку переходить по ссылкам из письма мне не требовалось, не сообщал об этом. Изображения в письмах загружаются нормально, но ссылки не работают. Сейчас мне необходимо было подтвердить новый адрес электронной почты, по ссылке из письма, поэтому, пришлось решать проблему. > > Отключение правила или полная остановка защиты в AG мне не помогла, так как фильтрующие AG DNS у меня прописаны не только в блокировщике рекламы AG, но и в настройках Windows и в Wi-Fi маршрутизаторе. > > Проблему решил следующим способом: > 1. Полностью отключил защиту AG. > 2. Запустил AG VPN, выбрал DNS от Google и VPN-локацию "Россия". > После этого, смог подтвердить адрес электронной почты, перейдя по ссылке в электронном письме, которая ранее не работала. > > Из интересного, пользуюсь антивирусом Касперского, в максимальной редакции. Модуль антибаннера в антивирусе полностью отключён. А вот модуль защиты от сервисов сбора аналитики включён, он не конфликтует с блокировщиком рекламы AG. Веб-сайт citilink.ru находится в исключениях у модуля блокировки сервисов аналитики Касперского, так как если блокировать их, это может привести к нарушению работоспособности сайта Ситилинк. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/ngj4j6s1tv4s8kwk8ss440w0skc0440q5f974bbuas.png?nc=1)

Модуль антибаннера в антивирусе полностью отключён. А вот модуль защиты от сервисов сбора аналитики включён, он не конфликтует с блокировщиком рекламы AG. Веб-сайт citilink.ru находится в исключениях у модуля блокировки сервисов аналитики Касперского, так как если блокировать их, это может привести к нарушению работоспособности сайта Ситилинк. ### Screenshots

comment.body: > [@prohunterallen](https://github.com/prohunterallen) Ok, please open browser's DevTools, go to Network and enter `-status-code:200` and try to re-enable subtitles, and export HAR > > > Most likely, the status of the request will be 403 or another status other than 200. I am interested in requests with a response code other than 200. [www.crunshyroll.com.har](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1GCzXMtcXkyQegWdVhpQyPIzBjl2l6oC2/view?usp=sharing)

issue.title: www.citilink.ru

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

labels.name: A: Waiting for data
labels.description: Waiting for more information from the user

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.citilink.ru/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.citilink.ru%2F) ### Comment > Вероятно, DNS-правило ||stghyx.citilink.ru^ в DNS-фильтре AG ломает электронные письма от магазина электроники Ситилинк, в том числе, письма с подтверждением адреса электронной почты аккаунта. Эту проблему я заметил уже давно, но поскольку переходить по ссылкам из письма мне не требовалось, не сообщал об этом. Изображения в письмах загружаются нормально, но ссылки не работают. Сейчас мне необходимо было подтвердить новый адрес электронной почты, по ссылке из письма, поэтому, пришлось решать проблему. > > Отключение правила или полная остановка защиты в AG мне не помогла, так как фильтрующие AG DNS у меня прописаны не только в блокировщике рекламы AG, но и в настройках Windows и в Wi-Fi маршрутизаторе. > > Проблему решил следующим способом: > 1. Полностью отключил защиту AG. > 2. Запустил AG VPN, выбрал DNS от Google и VPN-локацию "Россия". > После этого, смог подтвердить адрес электронной почты, перейдя по ссылке в электронном письме, которая ранее не работала. > > Из интересного, пользуюсь антивирусом Касперского, в максимальной редакции. Модуль антибаннера в антивирусе полностью отключён. А вот модуль защиты от сервисов сбора аналитики включён, он не конфликтует с блокировщиком рекламы AG. Веб-сайт citilink.ru находится в исключениях у модуля блокировки сервисов аналитики Касперского, так как если блокировать их, это может привести к нарушению работоспособности сайта Ситилинк. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/ngj4j6s1tv4s8kwk8ss440w0skc0440q5f974bbuas.png?nc=1)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
 [http://taptapsend.com](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Ftaptapsend.com)
### Comment
> When utilizing the Tap Tap Send application, I have observed a consistent issue that arises under specific network configurations. The application functions without incident when my home modem's DNS is set to 8.8.8.8, when I am connected via mobile data, or when my Android device uses its default DNS settings. However, if I configure my mobile device's private DNS to dns.adguard.com, or if I use a adguard DNS IP address within my home network's modem settings, the Tap Tap Send application consistently displays an error message, as depicted in the attached screenshot.

### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 </summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/fd1ymfz0xr4k80k44o8swg4cskk8ss8f0zzkam4l34.jpg?nc=1)

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/9dm9idxaeg4kg0c4k88wcwk0gog4g009oypa9nc31s.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

Information | Value

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[NSFW] [http://ourdream.ai](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fourdream.ai)
### Comment
> AdGuard DNS is blocking ourdream.ai and all subdomains, returning 0.0.0.0 instead of the correct IP.
> 
> Verification:
> ```sh
> # Google DNS (correct)
> dig @8.8.8.8 api.core.ourdream.ai +short
> 104.18.19.4
> 104.18.18.4
> 
> # AdGuard DNS (blocked)
> dig @94.140.14.14 api.core.ourdream.ai +short
> 0.0.0.0
> 
> dig @94.140.14.14 ourdream.ai +short
> 0.0.0.0
> ```
> 
> Context:
> 
> Ad-serving services are isolated under the core subdomain (e.g., core.ourdream.ai). We previously ran non-ad-related services under this subdomain as well, which may be why the entire domain was flagged. This is no longer the case. The root domain (ourdream.ai) and other subdomains are entirely unrelated to ad serving.
> 
> Request: Please remove the blanket block on ourdream.ai and limit any filtering to the core subdomain only.

### [NSFW] Screenshots
  [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/dwhnxloq4x4oo448cccw8ococgsw0cga8rkaphite0.png?nc=1)
  [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/t53ww0hxj9c4s8kows84ckgk0kcwgk0a0400t6tkcg.png?nc=1)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[NSFW] [http://ourdream.ai](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fourdream.ai)
### Comment
> AdGuard DNS is blocking ourdream.ai and all subdomains, returning 0.0.0.0 instead of the correct IP.
> 
> Verification:
> ```sh
> # Google DNS (correct)
> dig @8.8.8.8 api.core.ourdream.ai +short
> 104.18.19.4
> 104.18.18.4
> 
> # AdGuard DNS (blocked)
> dig @94.140.14.14 api.core.ourdream.ai +short
> 0.0.0.0
> 
> dig @94.140.14.14 ourdream.ai +short
> 0.0.0.0
> ```
> 
> Context:
> 
> Ad-serving services are isolated under the core subdomain (e.g., core.ourdream.ai). We previously ran non-ad-related services under this subdomain as well, which may be why the entire domain was flagged. This is no longer the case. The root domain (ourdream.ai) and other subdomains are entirely unrelated to ad serving.
> 
> Request: Please remove the blanket block on ourdream.ai and limit any filtering to the core subdomain only.

### [NSFW] Screenshots
  [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/dwhnxloq4x4oo448cccw8ococgsw0cga8rkaphite0.png?nc=1)

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

labels.name: NSFW
labels.description: Nudes and porn sites

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973
